name: widget-fraction-bar-pass
description: Well-formed grade-3 fraction-bar visual-comparison question. Stem asks 'Which model is 1/3?' Correct choice (index 0) is a fraction-bar with parts=3, filled=1. Three distractors reflect real misconceptions (1/6, 2/3, 1/4) — none are mathematically equivalent to 1/3. Judge should PASS.

question.question: Which model represents 1/3 of the rectangle?
question.explanation: The rectangle is divided into 3 equal parts, and 1 of those parts is shaded. That shows 1/3.
